positive: A symmetrical, intricate mandala design featuring bioluminescent celestial flora and stylized forest elements. The composition should be centralized, highly detailed, and suitable for repeating surface print. Incorporate glowing crescent moons, stylized woodland spirits, branching roots, and exotic patterned leaves. The style should be a fusion of intricate etched line art, Art Nouveau curves, and modern graphic engraving, utilizing strong black and white contrast with selective touches of deep sapphire blue and phosphorescent lime green glow. The overall aesthetic must be clean, high-contrast, and possess a distinct, stylized silhouette. Vector art quality, zentangle patterns, perfect symmetry, high resolution, clean lines.
